TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == ulic- u sakamuwen nu Palaml ngatu pitu == palamalay-dungy milikat tu lamal lacul-1 pipalamal nu mita hanaku kita haw haw uyniyan u mimelaway tuni palamal nu mita haw uni u babalaki ci mulak a pabelin kuheni tuniyan papalamalan haw palamalay haw a mulikat kuheni haw uyni na tatusaay nuniyan nu niyazu' atuni u ťē∑Śģėnu mita haw a pabeli tuniyan u lalimaay haw uniyan lacul-2 a uniay u papalamalan haw sipabeli tuniyan u kaludungi nu niyazu' haw u sumanahay kuniyan an dungi haw u sumanahay kuni u saayaway haw a uniyan u sangelacay ku niyan nu niyazu' haw u niyan haw u langdaway haw u sumilaway haw u sumilaway kuniyan a u lumeniay nu mita lacul-3 a mamintu kuheni mapabeli tu papalamal haw a malingatu tu kita kita u sakizaya mamin ayza haw malingatu tu ku pipalamal nu mita ayza miheca lacul-4 patayni tuniyan u malataw patayni tuniyan u babalaki nu mita haw itini tu nipalamal nu mita haw itini kuheni haw amu awaw tuniyan u dungi nu babalaki tuniyan u malataw haw tatayni itini i tatalisinan nu mita haw a uniyan u nipiawaw nuheni matenes ku niyan
S.PHON: == ur~…ĺi ¶- u sakamuw…ôn nu par~…ĺamr~…ĺ Ňčatu pitu == par~…ĺamar~…ĺaj-duŇčj mir~…ĺikat tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ-* pipar~…ĺamar~…ĺ nu mita ńßanaku kita ńßaw ńßaw ujnijan u mim…ôr~…ĺawaj tuni par~…ĺamar~…ĺ nu mita ńßaw uni u babar~…ĺaki ¶i mur~…ĺak a pab…ôr~…ĺin kuńß…ôni tunijan papar~…ĺamar~…ĺan ńßaw par~…ĺamar~…ĺaj ńßaw a mur~…ĺikat kuńß…ôni ńßaw ujni na tatusaaj nunijan nu nijazu Ē~ ° atuni u **nu mita ńßaw a pab…ôr~…ĺi tunijan u r~…ĺar~…ĺimaaj ńßaw unijan r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ-* a uniaj u papar~…ĺamar~…ĺan ńßaw sipab…ôr~…ĺi tunijan u kar~…ĺuduŇči nu nijazu Ē~ ° ńßaw u sumanańßaj kunijan an duŇči ńßaw u sumanańßaj kuni u saajawaj ńßaw a unijan u saŇč…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj ku nijan nu nijazu Ē~ ° ńßaw u nijan ńßaw u r~…ĺaŇčdawaj ńßaw u sumir~…ĺawaj ńßaw u sumir~…ĺawaj kunijan a u r~…ĺum…ôniaj nu mita r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ-* a mamintu kuńß…ôni mapab…ôr~…ĺi tu papar~…ĺamar~…ĺ ńßaw a mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu kita kita u sakizaja mamin ajza ńßaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu ku pipar~…ĺamar~…ĺ nu mita ajza mińß…ô ¶a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ-* patajni tunijan u mar~…ĺataw patajni tunijan u babar~…ĺaki nu mita ńßaw itini tu nipar~…ĺamar~…ĺ nu mita ńßaw itini kuńß…ôni ńßaw amu awaw tunijan u duŇči nu babar~…ĺaki tunijan u mar~…ĺataw ńßaw tatajni itini i tatar~…ĺisinan nu mita ńßaw a unijan u nipiawaw nuńß…ôni mat…ôn…ôs ku nijan
S.FORM: == ulic- u sakamuwen nu Palaml ngatu pitu == palamalay-dungy milikat tu lamal lacul-1 pipalamal nu mita hanaku kita haw haw uyniyan u mimelaway tuni palamal nu mita haw uni u babalaki ci mulak a pabelin kuheni tuniyan papalamalan haw palamalay haw a mulikat kuheni haw uyni na tatusaay nuniyan nu niyazu' atuni u ťē∑Śģėnu mita haw a pabeli tuniyan u lalimaay haw uniyan lacul-2 a uniay u papalamalan haw sipabeli tuniyan u kaludungi nu niyazu' haw u sumanahay kuniyan an dungi haw u sumanahay kuni u saayaway haw a uniyan u sangelacay ku niyan nu niyazu' haw u niyan haw u langdaway haw u sumilaway haw u sumilaway kuniyan a u lumeniay nu mita lacul-3 a mamintu kuheni mapabeli tu papalamal haw a malingatu tu kita kita u sakizaya mamin ayza haw malingatu tu ku pipalamal nu mita ayza miheca lacul-4 patayni tuniyan u malataw patayni tuniyan u babalaki nu mita haw itini tu nipalamal nu mita haw itini kuheni haw amu awaw tuniyan u dungi nu babalaki tuniyan u malataw haw tatayni itini i tatalisinan nu mita haw a uniyan u nipiawaw nuheni matenes ku niyan
S.PHON: == ur~…ĺi ¶- u sakamuw…ôn nu par~…ĺamr~…ĺ Ňčatu pitu == par~…ĺamar~…ĺaj-duŇčj mir~…ĺikat tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ-* pipar~…ĺamar~…ĺ nu mita ńßanaku kita ńßaw ńßaw ujnijan u mim…ôr~…ĺawaj tuni par~…ĺamar~…ĺ nu mita ńßaw uni u babar~…ĺaki ¶i mur~…ĺak a pab…ôr~…ĺin kuńß…ôni tunijan papar~…ĺamar~…ĺan ńßaw par~…ĺamar~…ĺaj ńßaw a mur~…ĺikat kuńß…ôni ńßaw ujni na tatusaaj nunijan nu nijazu Ē~ ° atuni u **nu mita ńßaw a pab…ôr~…ĺi tunijan u r~…ĺar~…ĺimaaj ńßaw unijan r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ-* a uniaj u papar~…ĺamar~…ĺan ńßaw sipab…ôr~…ĺi tunijan u kar~…ĺuduŇči nu nijazu Ē~ ° ńßaw u sumanańßaj kunijan an duŇči ńßaw u sumanańßaj kuni u saajawaj ńßaw a unijan u saŇč…ôr~…ĺa ¶aj ku nijan nu nijazu Ē~ ° ńßaw u nijan ńßaw u r~…ĺaŇčdawaj ńßaw u sumir~…ĺawaj ńßaw u sumir~…ĺawaj kunijan a u r~…ĺum…ôniaj nu mita r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ-* a mamintu kuńß…ôni mapab…ôr~…ĺi tu papar~…ĺamar~…ĺ ńßaw a mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu kita kita u sakizaja mamin ajza ńßaw mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu ku pipar~…ĺamar~…ĺ nu mita ajza mińß…ô ¶a r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ-* patajni tunijan u mar~…ĺataw patajni tunijan u babar~…ĺaki nu mita ńßaw itini tu nipar~…ĺamar~…ĺ nu mita ńßaw itini kuńß…ôni ńßaw amu awaw tunijan u duŇči nu babar~…ĺaki tunijan u mar~…ĺataw ńßaw tatajni itini i tatar~…ĺisinan nu mita ńßaw a unijan u nipiawaw nuńß…ôni mat…ôn…ôs ku nijan
